qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Science or Engineering in Physics, Applied Physics, Engg. Phys, Optics etc. with a minimum 70% marks, 6 months of hands-on experience in working with lasers, atomic spectroscopy and/or atomic magnetometry, Knowledge of optics, atomic physics and laser spectroscopy
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Bachelor's degree in Science or Engineering in Physics, Applied Physics, Engg. Phys, Optics etc. with a minimum 70% marks. Project Associate: B.E./ B.Tech. or equivalent degree in Computer Science or Information Technology or Electronics & Communication or a related field with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent grade points.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TIFR Project Assistant and Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TIFR Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR Project Assistant and Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TIFR Project Assistant and Project Associate recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant and Project Associate role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant and Project Associate position, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Science or Engineering in fields like Physics, Applied Physics, Engg. Phys, or Optics, with a minimum of 70% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this TIFR recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have at least 6 months of hands-on experience in working with lasers, atomic spectroscopy, and/or atomic magnetometry to be considered for the Project Assistant and Project Associate role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant and Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant and Project Associate position is 25 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government norms, which are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the TIFR Project Assistant and Project Associate job?
faq.answer: Applications for the TIFR Project Assistant and Project Associate position are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this TIFR Project Assistant and Project Associate recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant and Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is 5 vacancy for the Project Assistant and Project Associate post announced under TIFR Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this TIFR position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant and Project Associate position at TIFR is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for TIFR Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
